title: fix and update
body:
* 修复 timeline 的 bug，关联：https://github.com/pyecharts/pyecharts/issues/2361
* 更新一些配置的引用位置和方式
    * `markline`, `markarea` 增加动画配置项：https://github.com/pyecharts/pyecharts/issues/2362

step_plan.summary: This PR fixes a timeline component merging bug (#2361) and adds animation options for markLine/markArea (#2362) by updating Timeline merging/propagation logic and extending MarkLineOpts and MarkAreaOpts with optional animation fields. The changes are scoped to two Python modules to minimize risk and maintain backward compatibility.

steps.operation: Improve merging logic in Timeline.__check_components to append rather than overwrite components across timepoints
steps.reason: Fix bug where merging per-timepoint components (grid, xAxis, yAxis, etc.) could lead to dropped or duplicated axes/legends when multiple charts are stitched into a Timeline; ensure robust, incremental merging across timepoints.
steps.side_effects: Potential changes to internal state consistency; may require updates to unit/integration tests that validate component merging across timepoints; could affect serialization of baseOption and per-timepoint options.

steps.operation: Ensure Timeline.add properly updates internal time_points, baseOption, and per-timepoint configurations when a new chart is added
steps.reason: Guarantee consistent propagation of dependencies and configuration when new charts are appended to the Timeline, preventing stale or missing timepoint configurations.
steps.side_effects: Tests for multi-chart timelines may need adjustments; API behavior for adding charts should remain backward-compatible but with improved state updates.

steps.operation: Make Timeline.add_schema robust with sane defaults and guard against None, preparing for future animation config support if needed
steps.reason: Prevent invalid input from breaking Timeline construction and lay groundwork for integrating new animation-related options without breaking existing usage.
steps.side_effects: Low risk to existing behavior; may require default configuration tests to be updated to reflect stricter guards and sane defaults.

steps.operation: Add animation-related fields to MarkLineOpts to support new animation feature
steps.reason: Introduce optional animation configuration (animation, animationDuration, animationDelay, animationDurationUpdate, animationDelayUpdate, animationEasing) for MarkLine while preserving backward compatibility.
steps.side_effects: Serialization of MarkLine options will include new fields when provided; downstream tests and docs may need updates to cover new options.

steps.operation: Add animation-related fields to MarkAreaOpts to support new animation feature
steps.reason: Introduce optional animation configuration (same set as MarkLine) for MarkArea while preserving backward compatibility.
steps.side_effects: Serialization of MarkArea options will include new fields when provided; downstream tests and docs may need updates to cover new options.
